team_description: A team of the greatest philosophers from East and West, from ancient Greek Socrates, Plato, and Aristotle, to Chinese Confucius and Laozi, to German Kant and Nietzsche. Experience philosophical thinking on life, ethics, and truth.

members.name: Socrates
members.description: Ancient Greek philosopher, founder of the Socratic method, advocated 'Know Thyself', guided people to discover truth through questioning.

members.name: Plato
members.description: Student of Socrates, one of the most important philosophers in Western history, proposed the Theory of Forms and the concept of the ideal state.

members.name: Aristotle
members.description: Student of Plato, encyclopedic philosopher, made groundbreaking contributions to logic, ethics, politics, physics, and more.

members.name: Confucius
members.description: Ancient Chinese thinker and educator, founder of Confucianism, advocated benevolence, righteousness, propriety, wisdom, and faithfulness.

members.name: Laozi
members.description: Founder of Taoism, author of Tao Te Ching, advocated wu wei (non-action) and harmony with nature.

members.name: Seneca
members.description: Roman Stoic philosopher, statesman, and dramatist, emphasized inner peace and the importance of virtue.

members.name: Immanuel Kant
members.description: Founder of German classical philosophy, author of Critique of Pure Reason, explored transcendental foundations of knowledge, morality, and aesthetics.

members.name: Friedrich Nietzsche
members.description: German philosopher, introduced concepts of Übermensch, will to power, and 'God is dead', profoundly influenced modern philosophy.
